meaning: v.嗽口,(用清水)刷,冲洗掉,漂净n.嗽洗,漂洗,漂清,冲洗
examples: I gave the glass a rinse.
I wanted to rinse the taste out of my mouth.
Fabric conditioner is added during the final rinse.
Rinse off in your outdoor shower and unwind with some tunes on the Bose stereo.
Get off the chair, ski down, find a new bib of the opposite color, rinse, repeat.
